subject: Introductory call for Software Engineer, New Grad
body: I reviewed your application and would love to schedule an introductory call. Please prepare questions about the team, your timeline, and why Notion interests you.

subject: AI capstone review expectations
body: For Saturday's project review, bring your architecture diagram, eval metrics, experiment table, failure analysis, and a short demo script.

subject: Resume feedback due tomorrow
body: Please submit your revised resume by Saturday 5 PM. Include links to projects and a concise new-grad summary.

subject: Study group agenda
body: For the data structures study group, we will cover heaps, graph traversal, and interview-style explanations.

subject: Weekly tech links
body: A list of optional readings about AI agents and productivity tools.
